socketedItems.secDescrText: Create a Tornado that hinders and repeatedly damages enemies around it. It will move forward for a duration, during which your projectiles can collide with it to deal damage as though it was an enemy. explicitMods: During initial Duration, can be hit by your Projectiles up to 20 times
